summary: Iteration 46: Testing new testimonials/reviews section on landing page, updated photo instructions in 3D Designer, and backend reviews API with 8 seed reviews. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/reviews - Returns reviews array with 8+ seeded reviews
✅ GET /api/reviews - Returns stats object (total, avg_rating, recommend_pct, avg_project_min, total_saved_eur)
✅ Reviews contain required fields (name, city, rating, text)
✅ Testimonials shows star ratings with 4.9/5 average (8 отзива)
✅ Testimonials shows stats: 8 доволни клиента, 100% препоръчват, 14 мин среден проект, €24,500 спестени общо
✅ Review cards display name, city, star rating, avatar initial, review text
✅ 3D Designer photo guide shows updated labels: 'Общ план', 'Ъгъл 1', 'Ъгъл 2'
seed_data_creation: 8 initial reviews seeded in INITIAL_REVIEWS array (server.py lines 1296-1305)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 verified testimonials carousel on landing page with desktop (3 cards) and mobile (1 card) views. Reviews API at /api/reviews returns reviews array + stats object. POST /api/reviews requires authentication. 3D Designer photo labels are 'Общ план', 'Ъгъл 1', 'Ъгъл 2'. Pricing features correctly show 'снимки' not 'видео'. Key data-testids: testimonials-section, review-card-0/1/2, review-prev, review-next, reviews-desktop, reviews-mobile, guide-toggle, guide-content, photo-upload-grid, temadom-logo.

testimonials_section.details: Section with data-testid='testimonials-section' present between style tiles and CTA

testimonials_stats.details: Shows: 8 доволни клиента, 100% препоръчват, 14 мин среден проект, €24,500 спестени общо

review_cards_desktop.details: 3 cards visible on desktop with star ratings, avatars, names, cities, review text

review_cards_mobile.details: 1 card visible on mobile with swipe/carousel navigation

carousel_navigation.details: Prev/next buttons (review-prev, review-next) work, dots for pagination visible

reviews_api_get.details: GET /api/reviews returns reviews array with 8 seeded reviews and stats object

photo_guide_instructions.details: Guide mentions new positions: general view + 2 corner shots with directions

pricing_snimki.details: Pricing features mention 'снимки' not 'видео': '3 снимки → 360° дизайн'

logo_display.details: Logo displays correctly with data-testid='temadom-logo', src='/temadom-logo.png'
